name: Lima Bean
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the soaked lima beans.
2. Wash the drained beans.
3. Cover with fresh water and cook until soft, about 45 to 60 minutes, depending on the age of the bean.
4. Drain the beans and reserve the stock for soups later.
5. Combine the cooked lima beans and diced tomatoes in a serving bowl.
6. Whisk together the remaining ingredients (olive oil, red wine vinegar, maple sugar, salt and pepper, dry mustard) except parsley.
7. Toss the dressing with the beans and tomatoes.
8. Chill the mixture.
9. Garnish with chopped parsley before serving.
